name: submit_plan
description: Submit a multi-step execution plan for operator approval BEFORE executing any tools. Use this when the goal requires 3+ destructive tool calls, or when the operator explicitly asked for a plan. Each step lists a tool name (must exist in the catalog), the params, and which earlier step IDs it depends on. Do NOT execute any other tools in the same response as submit_plan -- the plan is reviewed first.

goal.description: One-sentence statement of what the plan accomplishes.

tool.description: Name of a tool in the catalog

reversible.description: Whether the catalog entry has a reverseTool

name: ask_operator
description: When you need information the operator hasn't provided (e.g. the leaver's manager UPN, a successor for a sole-owner team), call this tool with a clear question. The operator's reply will arrive as a tool_result on the next turn.
